issue.title: fix: in-app update install path is unreachable — dialog plugin missing capability permission

phases.title: Grant dialog capability and surface updater errors
phases.content: Add `dialog:default` to apps/desktop/src-tauri/capabilities/default.json permissions array. In apps/desktop/src/utils/updater.ts, replace the silent `console.error` in the catch block with a user-facing error toast: `useToastStore.getState().addToast("Update failed: ${error}", 'error', 8000)`. Keep the console.error for DevTools debugging.
verification: catch block calls addToast with type 'error'

phases.title: Add progress feedback for download/install
phases.content: Extend toastStore with an `updateToast(id, message)` action that mutates an existing toast's message in place (no flicker). In updater.ts, before `update.downloadAndInstall()`: show a 'Downloading update v{version}...' toast with a long duration. Wire the downloadAndInstall onEvent callback (Started / Progress / Finished) to update the same toast with percentage when contentLength is known. After download, show 'Installing update...' before relaunch.
verification: updater.ts shows downloading toast before downloadAndInstall
updater.ts shows installing toast before relaunch
onEvent callback computes percentage from contentLength + accumulated chunks
